field_reviews.paper_evidence: We think it is time to widen the classical hourglass backend and embrace progressive lowering across a diverse set of structured abstractions to bring domain-specific code generation to compiler backends.
field_reviews.reason: 该字段准确概括了论文提出多层级后端以缓解传统后端信息瓶颈的目标。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We use incremental register allocation over structured IRs, while dropping classical spilling heuristics, and show up to 90% floating-point unit (FPU) utilization across key DNN kernels.
field_reviews.reason: 总体意义判断基本成立，但“为CUTE项目提供直接可借鉴的方法论和实验验证”属于面向你们课题的外推，不是论文原文结论。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保留其对RISC-V自定义加速器编译器基础设施的意义，弱化对CUTE的“直接实验验证”表述。

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
Our contributions are:
• A low-level representation of the RISC-V ISA and Snitch
accelerator extensions in a collection of SSA-based IRs
(Sections 3.1 and 3.2).
• A multi-level and spill-free register allocator for structured
backend IRs (Section 3.3).
• A progressive lowering from a high-level DSL down to the
aforementioned RISC-V SSA-based IRs (Section 3.4).
field_reviews.reason: 前三项贡献与原文一致。第四项贡献的证据引文未完整落在论文文本中，且把42% LLVM基线写进贡献点会让贡献与实验结果混杂。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保留前三项；第四项改写为论文明确给出的评估结论，并替换为可直接定位的英文引文。

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
By breaking the backend hourglass model, we reopen the path from domain-
specific abstractions to specialized hardware.
field_reviews.reason: 论文核心是编译器后端、IR设计和渐进式lowering，主主题归入编译器方向正确。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We demonstrate this concept by implementing a custom backend for a RISC-V-based accelerator with hardware loops and streaming registers, leveraging knowledge about the hardware at levels of abstraction that match its custom instruction set architecture (ISA).
field_reviews.reason: 论文聚焦Snitch的自定义ISA扩展，而不是RVV或通用向量扩展；将次主题标成RVV/vector会误导。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 改为 4. RISC-V custom ISA / open ISA AI extension

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
Our modular approach makes it easy to extend backends
to target accelerators with custom ISA extensions, by lever-
aging shared abstractions and infrastructure.
field_reviews.reason: 论文更贴近RISC-V ISA与编译器/operator generation工作流，归入workstream 2合理。

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
We implement our idea as a backend
for Snitch [80], a scalable in-order RISC-V core with custom
extensions for streaming registers and hardware loops, and
generate high-performance DNN kernels for Snitch.
field_reviews.reason: 该工作是相关方法参考，不是CUTE矩阵/张量扩展的直接基线，设为false较稳妥。

field_reviews.paper_evidence: We pair base IRs modelling the core instruction set architecture (ISA) (e.g., RISC-V) with structured IRs for domain-specific accelerator extensions. We support structured control flow and non-standard register usage through a multi-level register allocator that operates across IR abstractions.
field_reviews.reason: 对多层级SSA IR与多层级寄存器分配器的概述有依据；但“展开因子=4匹配Snitch FPU三级流水线深度”“确定性的调度策略而非昂贵调度空间搜索”这类细节较强，最好收敛到论文明确论述。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保留多层级IR、spill-free寄存器分配、从linalg经memref_stream到Snitch扩展的lowering，删除过细或推断性色彩较强的机制解释。

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
In our measurements, they have similar performance, both
peaking at approximately 42% utilization (Figure 10).
Figure 11. Sustained throughput of the 64-bit MatMul kernel
(𝐶𝑀×𝑁= 𝐴𝑀×𝐾𝐵𝐾×𝑁when 𝑀= 1). We achieve throughput
of over 90% (≥1.80 FLOPs/cycle) of the theoretical peak
(above the white border) as shape sizes increase.
MatMulT
11/20
12/15
field_reviews.reason: 关键数字与论文相符，包括42% LLVM基线、64-bit MatMul超过1.80 FLOPs/cycle，以及MatMulT的寄存器压力。文字上可更保守，避免把不同图表结论拼接得过满。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保持数字，但按论文原始实验结论重写为更紧凑表述。

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
While the decision to exclude registers used for
function arguments and results does not present a challenge
for kernels of similar characteristics to our chosen set, it
might become a concern for those with more involved fea-
tures such as deeper loop nests.
We select shape sizes to fit within the TCDM
(Section 2.4) such that our performance measurements are
not influenced by the rest of the memory hierarchy.
Snitch’s in-order core and software-managed L1 cache
make its performance predictable, allowing us to build a
simple scheduling pipeline, obviating the need for expensive
schedule space exploration.
field_reviews.reason: 第1、3、4项gap方向基本成立，但第1和第3项原证据不是逐字引文，需要修正；第2项“尚未证明通用性和可移植性”是合理推断，但现有证据更适合支撑“方法具有可扩展潜力”而非直接证明缺口。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 修正第1和第3项英文引文；保留第2项但明确这是基于仅在Snitch上展示得到的保守推断；第4项保持。

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
To the best
of our knowledge, our work is the first MLIR-based compiler
backend that captures accelerator-specific abstractions and
employs a self-contained code generation scheme.
field_reviews.reason: 将其作为该方向代表性最新工作基本合理，但“最前沿水平”与“首次”都应限定在论文自述范围内，避免过强外推。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 改写为“CGO 2025上的代表性近期工作，论文自述为首个MLIR-based、捕获加速器特定抽象且自包含代码生成的后端”。

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
In our measurements, they have similar performance, both
peaking at approximately 42% utilization (Figure 10).
We implement our idea as a backend
for Snitch [80], a scalable in-order RISC-V core with custom
extensions for streaming registers and hardware loops.
field_reviews.reason: 传统LLVM流程在Snitch上约42%利用率有直接证据；但“直接支撑开题报告对RISC-V AI扩展编译器支持不足的gap论证”属于面向提案的延伸，需更谨慎。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保留LLVM基线不足和仅在Snitch验证两点，改为“可作为相关gap的间接证据”。

field_reviews.paper_evidence:
show up to 90% floating-point unit
(FPU) utilization across key DNN kernels.
MatMulT
11/20
12/15
• Code licenses (if publicly available)?: Apache License
version 2.0 with LLVM Exceptions.
field_reviews.reason: 90%利用率、寄存器压力、开源许可证都有依据；但“相比LLVM后端的42%提升超过2倍”是你方计算，不是论文直接表述，可保留数字但弱化口吻。
field_reviews.suggested_fix: 保持核心可行性论证，但把“超过2倍”改成更中性的“显著高于约42%的LLVM流程”。

issues.paper_evidence:
An evaluation demonstrating peak performance for hand-
written micro-kernels (up to 95% floating-point unit (FPU)
utilization), and close-to-matching performance (up to 90%
issues.problem: 该证据字符串在原文中未以当前完整形式逐字出现，存在跨版面/断句拼接问题。
issues.recommended_action: 将第四项贡献改写为更保守的实验贡献，并使用可直接定位的英文原文引文。

issues.paper_evidence: We demonstrate this concept by implementing a custom backend for a RISC-V-based accelerator with hardware loops and streaming registers, leveraging knowledge about the hardware at levels of abstraction that match its custom instruction set architecture (ISA).
issues.problem: 次主题被标为RVV/vector enhancement，但论文并未讨论RVV，核心是Snitch自定义ISA扩展。
issues.recommended_action: 将 `theme_secondary` 改为 `4. RISC-V custom ISA / open ISA AI extension`。

issues.paper_evidence:
While the decision to exclude registers used for
function arguments and results does not present a challenge
for kernels of similar characteristics to our chosen set, it
might become a concern for those with more involved fea-
tures such as deeper loop nests.
issues.problem: 原evidence不是严格逐字引文，缺少换行/断词形式。
issues.recommended_action: 替换为上面的逐字引文，保留该gap但收敛措辞。

issues.paper_evidence:
We select shape sizes to fit within the TCDM
(Section 2.4) such that our performance measurements are
not influenced by the rest of the memory hierarchy.
issues.problem: 原evidence在末尾追加了下一句，未与论文文本逐字对应。
issues.recommended_action: 改为可直接定位的句子，并将gap描述限定为“实验刻意避开更深层内存层次影响”。

issues.problem: `venue` 与语料库元数据不一致，当前写法扩展成了长会议名。
issues.recommended_action: 为保持与语料库字段一致，改回 `CGO`。

review_target.analysis_title: A Multi-level Compiler Backend for Accelerated Micro-kernels Targeting RISC-V ISA Extensions
review_target.paper_title: A Multi-level Compiler Backend for Accelerated Micro-kernels Targeting RISC-V ISA Extensions

summary: 该dossier整体抓住了论文主线，研究目的、主要贡献框架和关键数值结果大体可信。主要问题在于若干英文evidence不是严格逐字引文，以及次主题把Snitch自定义ISA误标成RVV/vector方向。另有少量面向CUTE提案的外推措辞偏强，需要收敛到论文明确支持的范围。
